message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "CLI: quote with unknown item type (e.g. broomstick) exits non-zero and writes error to stderr; no results on stdout"
Expected: non-zero exit, stderr message, no results on stdout
Implementation file: src/cli.ts AND src/claim-office.ts

Approach:
1. Define KNOWN_ITEM_TYPES set in claim-office.ts
2. In quote(): if any item.type not in known types, throw an Error
3. In cli.ts: wrap step processing in try/catch; on error, write message to stderr and process.exit(1) without writing results

Make sure the existing tests still pass (no item has unknown type in passing tests).

Known types: sword, amulet, staff, potion, rune, moonstone.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing test and implement the minimal code needed.
Now I'll implement the minimal changes. First, add the KNOWN_ITEM_TYPES check in claim-office.ts.

content.text:
All 43 tests pass (3 still todo). The Green phase is complete.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: 
- Added `KNOWN_ITEM_TYPES` set in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-21_08-35-47_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts` containing the 6 valid item types
- Added validation loop in `quote()` that throws `Error` with the offending type name when unknown
- Wrapped step processing in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-21_08-35-47_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/cli.ts` in try/catch that writes error message to stderr and exits with code 1 (before any stdout write)

**Result**: All tests now pass (43 passing, 3 todo).

**Approach**: Minimal — just enough to make the new test pass. The error message includes the literal item type (e.g. "broomstick"), which satisfies the regex `/broomstick|unknown/i` (matches both "Unknown" and "broomstick"). The stdout write is skipped because `process.exit(1)` runs before it. Existing tests are unaffected because all their items use known types.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
